title: Ethical Christmas Gift Card
description: Which eco‑friendly, digital gift cards are available in France for Christmas, with a price range of 30–50€ and valid in local ethical stores?
narrative: The user is searching for a sustainable holiday present: a digital voucher that guarantees the money goes to 100% ethical, ecological, and solidarity‑oriented businesses. They prefer a price of €30–€50, use‑case limited to online or local ethical stores, and need clear info about validity, delivery method, and usage restrictions.

title: Bulk Organic Tagliatelle Purchase
description: Looking for a supplier of 5‑kg or larger bulk organic tagliatelle, certified organic and egg‑free, with details on sourcing and pricing.
narrative: The user intends to procure large quantities of high‑quality organic pasta for a restaurant/foodservice operation. Relevance requires documents that provide specific product descriptions, bulk price information, certification details (organic, Bio‑Bourgeon), ingredient transparency (durum semolina, spring water), and supply chain information. Documents that mention the product name (Ticino), bulk availability (kg), and lack of additives/eggs should be considered relevant; items lacking those attributes or describing single‑serve packaging are not.

title: Lotus Hybrid Viability
description: Is the Lotus EVE Hybrid a genuine low‑cost, environmentally friendly family sedan, or merely a marketing stunt, and what are its real cost, technical specs, and emissions performance?
narrative: The user seeks confirmation of the product’s authenticity, details on its production cost, battery and motor configuration, CO2 reduction claim, and comparison to other hybrids; documents must provide factual production status, specifications, and emissions data.

title: Private Chef Booking
description: Where can I book a private chef for a specific date and dietary restrictions in Cavaillon?
narrative: The user is looking for a service that provides a chef who will prepare a seasonal, locally sourced menu in their own kitchen, including options for dietary restrictions and optional supplements such as wine or cheese. Relevant information will cover booking procedures, availability windows, pricing details (including ingredients and service fees), cancellation policies, and any constraints such as COVID‑19 restrictions or chef availability in the specific locality.

title: Peugeot 307 Tinting
description: Where can I find compliant tinted window kits for a Peugeot 307, what are the prices, and how can I install them?
narrative: The user wants to replace the windows of a Peugeot 307 (2003‑2011) with tinted film that satisfies French law (minimum 70 % visible light on front windows). They are looking for product options (shade variations, UV/heat protection levels), the cost of a ready‑cut kit, and clear installation instructions or services. Relevant documents should describe the Peugeot 307 compatibility, compliance with Article 27 of Decree 2016‑448, film specifications (25 % or 70 % transparency), pricing, and installation procedure.

title: Comparing Ocular RA vs. SLE
description: What are the key ocular differences that distinguish rheumatoid arthritis from systemic lupus erythematosus?
narrative: The user seeks a detailed comparison of ocular manifestations to support differential diagnosis, focusing on anterior‑segment findings (e.g., peripheral keratitis in RA) versus posterior‑segment signs (e.g., retinal hemorrhages in SLE). Relevance is judged by the inclusion of specific eye‑segment involvement, characteristic lesions, and clear distinctions between the two diseases.

title: Affordable Diesel SUVs
description: Find used diesel passenger cars priced under 6,000 CHF, mileage under 200,000 km, and located in Morgins.
narrative: The user wants a reliable, fuel‑efficient vehicle for weekend trips and light off‑road use. Relevant ads must: list a diesel engine, be classified as a passenger car or SUV, have a price ≤ 6,000 CHF, an odometer reading ≤ 200,000 km, and be posted in the Morgins location. Exclude advertisements that do not meet these specifications or that are not available for sale (e.g., supply or trade only).

title: Budget Family Camping
description: I want to find low‑cost camping accommodations in Brittany that offer kid‑friendly amenities near the sea.
narrative: The user seeks budget camping options suitable for a family group (e.g., 2 adults and 2–4 children) located close to a beach. Relevance requires accommodation with child‑friendly features such as a playground, swimming pool, kids’ club or animation, and adequate space for 4–8 persons. The user also wants the option to compare these camping sites with alternative holiday rentals (cottage, mobile home, apartment) based on price, location, and family facilities.

title: Job Centre Overpayment
description: What steps can a job seeker take to avoid overpayment and subsequent deductions at Pôle emploi?
narrative: The user is a current job seeker in France seeking detailed guidance on the common procedural mistakes that lead to overpayment, clarification of their rights and obligations, and practical steps to correct or prevent such errors. Documents that list frequent errors, outline preventive actions, describe rights and commitments, and provide contact information or procedures for remediation will be considered relevant.

title: Townhouses with Garden Near Andelys
description: Which townhouse listings near Andelys provide a garden, double garage, and fit a middle‑class budget?
narrative: The user is looking for a townhouse in the vicinity of Andelys that offers a private garden and a double garage of about 40 m², suitable for a young couple. Relevance requires the property to be listed for sale, in or around the postal codes 27380, 27370, or 27420 (i.e., Charleval, Thilliers‑en‑Vexin, or nearby villages), priced around €150 k, and described as a townhouse or semi‑detached with a garden.

title: Electric Car Comparison 2021
description: Which 2021 electric car offers the best balance of range, price, and driving comfort for urban and occasional long‑distance use?
narrative: The user is evaluating 2021 electric vehicles for purchase, weighing factors such as battery range (summer/winter), parking, price limits, battery ownership vs rental options, and charging network support. Relevant documents should provide detailed specifications, comparative scores, price points, and practical usage insights for vehicles like the Renault ZOE, Hyundai Kona, Tesla Model 3, and Peugeot e‑208.

title: Swedish Potato Side
description: What are the steps and ingredients needed to prepare traditional Swedish-style potatoes?
narrative: The user seeks a complete recipe for Swedish-style potatoes, including the ingredient list, preparation instructions, baking times, and optional variations such as adding Parmesan or adjusting butter amounts. Relevant documents should provide step‑by‑step instructions, precise measurements, and describe how the dish should be baked or finished, matching the classic Swedish preparation.

title: Future‑Age Poetry
description: I want to find poems that explore what life will be like ten years from now, reflecting on aging and personal growth.
narrative: The user is seeking literary works that contemplate a future self, similar to the poem "In 10 Years" by Gabriel, and wants other examples of poems that reflect on life after a decade, highlighting themes of aging, introspection, and personal evolution.

title: Burnout Escape Strategies
description: What practical methods can help professionals avoid burnout and maintain psychological well‑being in high‑pressure work environments?
narrative: The user is looking for evidence‑based, actionable interventions to prevent or recover from burnout, inspired by the "Crapauds Fous" metaphor and EfferveScience materials. Relevant documents should address stress‑defense techniques, workplace policy recommendations, self‑care practices, case studies from the Stress Fighters community, and any research cited by the movement. Non‑pertinent content that merely mentions toads for literary effect without providing concrete burnout guidance should be considered irrelevant.

title: Serre Chevalier Bike Park Video
description: Where can I find a promotional video of Serre Chevalier Bike Park featuring rider Bryan Regnier?
narrative: The user is looking for an official, professionally‑produced promotional video that showcases the bike park’s tracks, focuses on Bryan Regnier’s style and tricks, and was produced by Mountains Legacy Production for Serre Chevalier Tourism. Relevance requires that the video includes the bike park footage, the rider segment, and clear promotional intent.

title: Ministerial Dual Mandates
description: How does French law restrict ministers from holding local executive positions, and what are the political ramifications of recent cases?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of the legal and customary rules prohibiting ministers from simultaneously serving as mayors, council members, or other local executives, including the 1997 Jospin decision, the 2019 Edouard Philippe clarification, and recent resignations such as Gérald Darmanin’s departure from the Hauts‑de‑France regional council. Relevance is limited to documents that explain these prohibitions, describe the legal texts, and report on political consequences; unrelated policy discussions or biographical details are excluded.

title: Wife Loss Dreams
description: What symbolic meanings are associated with dreaming about losing one’s wife?
narrative: The user wants a detailed interpretation of dreams that involve losing their wife, including symbolic associations (such as the old woman, mattress symbolism, and themes of wealth or health), psychological implications (anxiety, fear of abandonment), and cultural variations in dream lore. Relevance criteria include credible dream dictionaries, scholarly analyses, and sources that explicitly discuss the symbolism of a wife’s loss in a dream context.

title: Creole Avocado Brandade
description: How can I prepare a Creole avocado brandade and what are its key ingredients and steps?
narrative: The user is looking for a complete recipe and detailed instructions for making a Creole avocado brandade, including the necessary ingredients, preparation techniques, flavor suggestions, and any traditional or recommended variations.

title: Intermediate Bodies Debate
description: What viewpoints on intermediate bodies were presented during the OTRE congress speeches and debates?
narrative: The user seeks to identify the arguments, positions, and potential reforms related to intermediate bodies as discussed by key OTRE officials and guest politicians at the OTRE congress, particularly during the opening speech, address to members, and the Europe workshop. Relevant documents should contain speeches, debate transcripts, or summaries that capture these viewpoints, including references to the theme “Let us reinvent ourselves!” and the discussion on Europe’s defiance or opportunity.

title: Urban Solar Evaluation
description: What are the key considerations for a homeowner deciding to switch to Urban Solar Energy’s green electricity and photovoltaic self‑consumption plan?
narrative: The user wants clear, objective information on Urban Solar Energy’s pricing structure, virtual storage costs, commitment terms, installation process, and the overall benefit of residential solar panels relative to other green electricity providers, so that they can evaluate whether a switch will reduce their electricity bills while meeting local renewable energy goals.

title: Home Delivery Used Cars
description: Search for used car options available for home delivery.
narrative: The user wants to find platforms that sell used cars with the convenience of home delivery, including details on available models, price filters, financing or credit options, and delivery logistics. Documents relevant to this need should provide concrete information on such services, vehicle listings, and associated costs or terms.

title: Thunderstorm Forecast
description: What is the likelihood and timing of thunderstorm activity tomorrow in my local area?
narrative: The user wants actionable weather information to plan outdoor activities; relevant documents should include forecasts, probability of precipitation, thunderstorm warnings or recent storm summaries that relate directly to the local region. Articles or posts that merely mention weather in passing or discuss unrelated personal topics are not relevant.

title: Faro Hotel Amenities
description: What amenities and nearby attractions does the Faro Hotel & Beach Club offer?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information about the hotel’s services, facilities, and proximity to local points of interest to decide if it meets their travel needs. Relevant documents should describe room features, dining options, leisure facilities, nearby landmarks, and booking policies.

title: Vehicle Rental Comparison
description: Which vehicle rental options—specialist agencies or supermarket/hypermarket providers—offer the best value, considering price, proximity, vehicle type and promotions?
narrative: The user wants to evaluate different vehicle rental providers to find the most cost‑effective solution for a specific need (e.g., a family holiday trip or a business outing). Relevance criteria include up‑to‑date price comparisons, availability of vehicle types (car, 4‑5 m³ van, 20 m³ moving truck), proximity to the user's location, and current promotions or bundles. Documents that discuss comparison tools, promotional offers, fleet details and practical guidance for choosing between specialist agencies and mass‑distribution retailers are considered relevant.

title: Green Potato Safety
description: How can I identify and safely handle potatoes that might be toxic?
narrative: The user is looking for practical guidance on determining when a potato is unsafe to eat—specifically signs such as greenish coloration, visible eyes or sprouts, and the presence of glycoalkaloids. Relevance requires information on potato toxicity, safe consumption thresholds, recommended disposal methods, and health consequences of consuming toxic potatoes. Documents unrelated to potato safety or that discuss other aspects of potato use (e.g., culinary recipes) are not pertinent.

title: Labruyère Moulin à Vent 2014
description: What are the tasting notes, production methods, and terroir characteristics of Domaine Labruyère's 2014 Moulin à Vent wine?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on the 2014 vintage of Domaine Labruyère’s Moulin à Vent, focusing on sensory profile (aroma, flavor, texture), winemaking practices (fermentation tanks, oak aging, malolactic treatment), terroir specifics (granite soil, altitude, vine age), and storage or serving guidelines. Eligible documents should provide concrete descriptions, production details, and expert evaluations that directly address these aspects.

title: Women’s hiking boots
description: I need women’s hiking boots under €100 that offer ankle support and durability for steep trails.
narrative: The user plans a multi-day hike in Belgium and is specifically looking for footwear that balances budget with robust trail‑grip, waterproofing, and ankle reinforcement. Relevance criteria include: price ≤ €100, women’s shoe classification, boot style designed for hiking (not casual sneakers or sandals), evidence of ankle‑support features (high ankle cut or reinforced sole), durability indicators (water‑resistant upper, sturdy outsole), and suitability for steep terrain. Documents that meet these conditions—mentioning brand, specifications, price, and technical attributes—should be considered relevant.}

title: VW Eos Power-Up
description: How can I reprogram a Volkswagen Eos 2.0 T(F)SI to boost horsepower while supporting E85 flex‑fuel?
narrative: The user is an owner of a Volkswagen Eos looking for a stage‑one ECU remap that increases power and reduces consumption, while ensuring compatibility with E85 fuel. Relevance criteria include detailed technical specifications—ECU model and part numbers, software versions, hardware upgrades, cost estimates, and step‑by‑step tuning procedures—from credible sources that address flex‑fuel conversion.

title: Al Quoz Car Rent
description: Which providers offer the lowest daily rates for economy cars in Al Quoz during the Expo 2020 season, and what safety deposit and health‑safety measures are required?
narrative: The user is a budget traveler who will be staying in the Al Quoz area of Dubai during the high‑traffic Expo 2020 period. They want to book a short‑term (1‑7 day) economy vehicle that is available immediately or within the next couple of days. Relevance is determined by listings that (1) list a daily rate below AED 200 (or equivalent USD) for an economy model, (2) specify a short lease period (1‑7 days), (3) show availability for the desired dates, (4) state the required deposit amount and payment method, and (5) describe WHO‑approved safety procedures such as vehicle disinfection, driver PPE, and pre‑authorization deposits. Providers that do not meet all these criteria are considered irrelevant.

title: Renault Express Purchase
description: Where can I find current listings for used Renault Express vehicles that include price, mileage, year, and condition?
narrative: The user wants to buy a used Renault Express and is looking for up‑to‑date, detailed listings across multiple classifieds sites. Relevant documents should list Renault Express cars with price, mileage, year, condition, location, and seller type (private or dealer) so the user can assess availability and negotiate.

title: Carmarthen‑Heathrow Transfer Cost
description: What is the most cost‑effective way to travel from Carmarthen to London Heathrow Airport, considering vehicle type, pickup location, time of day, and available discounts?
narrative: The user wants to compare all transfer options offered by the company for a journey from Carmarthen to Heathrow.  Relevance is determined by documents that provide pricing details (including 20‑30 % discounts), vehicle categories (economy minivan, standard minivan, luxury S‑class, etc.), hourly rental options, and service features such as Meet & Greet.  The search should surface information that allows the user to decide between an economy, business or luxury ride, account for different pickup points at Carmarthen, and consider the time‑dependent price adjustments for taxis versus private transfer bookings.

title: Car Rental in Ferrol
description: Where can I rent a car in Ferrol, Spain, and what models, prices, and insurance options are available?
narrative: The user wants to locate a car‑rental service in Ferrol, gather up‑to‑date pricing for different vehicle categories, compare insurance plans offered, and understand booking conditions. Relevant documents provide a list of vehicle types (Economy, Standard, Luxury), their prices for a 3‑day rental, and the insurance coverage options (Accident, Liability, Theft).

title: Bordeaux Weekend 2018
description: What events and activities were available in Bordeaux during the weekend of 8‑9‑10 June 2018?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of all happenings in Bordeaux that took place on 8‑9‑10 June 2018, including food festivals, pop‑up/street markets, sports activities, and nightlife. title: Land Purchase Criteria
description: What criteria should I consider when buying land and selecting a developer for my future home?
narrative: The user intends to purchase a building lot and wants to ensure the developer is reputable, the land is viable (connected to utilities and services), and that contractual terms include insurance, permits, and legal obligations. They need documents or sources that explain these criteria and help filter listings accordingly.

title: Voucher dispute resolution
description: Where can I find official guidance on how to resolve issues with lost, expired or disputed Wonderbox gift vouchers?
narrative: The user aims to understand the formal process for lodging complaints with Wonderbox, the role of their mediation service, required documentation such as voucher numbers or purchase receipts, eligibility criteria for refunds or credits, and how to appeal a denial. Relevance is judged by documents that detail internal complaint procedures, timelines, communication channels (email addresses like mediateur@wonderbox.fr), examples of successful resolutions, and legal obligations of the company regarding consumer protection.

title: Enlightenment Office Design
description: How did 18th‑century Enlightenment offices shape furniture design and spatial arrangements?
narrative: The user is researching the specific furniture types (writing tables, desks, chairs), color choices (green felt tables), and spatial organization of 18th‑century Enlightenment offices, seeking evidence that links these design elements to the rising bureaucratic practices and the shift from open‑space work to enclosed, disciplined workspaces.

title: Digital Photography Uniqueness
description: What defines a "unique" photograph in the age of ubiquitous digital imaging?
narrative: The user seeks scholarly and artistic analyses that interrogate the concept of uniqueness for photographs produced in a saturated digital environment. Relevant sources should discuss the cultural, aesthetic, and technical challenges of creating distinct images amid machine‑learning powered platforms, reference works such as Susanne Huth’s *Analog Algorithm – Landscapes of Machine Learning*, Douglas Coupland’s *Mikrosklaven* (and its photographic studies), as well as Katherine Oktober Matthews’s *Unique: Making Photographs in the Age of Ubiquity*. The topic rewards material that frames photography’s identity in relation to digital databases, image proliferation, and contemporary visual culture.

title: Salmon Leek Braid
description: How do I make a flaky salmon-leek pastry braid, what ingredients and steps are needed?
narrative: The user wants a detailed recipe for preparing a salmon‑and‑leek pastry braid, including ingredient amounts, preparation steps, baking temperature, and suitable side dishes or sauces such as paprika sauce or rice. Relevance requires a complete set of cooking instructions, time estimates, and flavor pairing suggestions.

title: Baby Hazel Care
description: What caregiving actions are required for Baby Hazel in the online games to keep her healthy and happy?
narrative: The user seeks instructions and strategies for managing Baby Hazel’s health and daily routines—such as treating injuries, handling illnesses, providing baths, dressing, and participating in activities. Relevance is determined by documents that describe caretaking tasks, medical treatment procedures, and everyday care details.

title: Mobility Aid Eligibility
description: What are the eligibility criteria and application steps for unemployment mobility assistance in France?
narrative: The user is a registered jobseeker looking to determine whether they qualify for mobility aid, what distance and employment‑type thresholds apply, how benefits and vouchers are calculated, and the precise steps for filing an application with Pôle emploi. Documents that discuss eligibility triggers, benefit ceilings, travel voucher rules, and procedural timelines should be considered relevant.

title: Van Gogh Late Works
description: Where can I find a documentary about Van Gogh’s final months after leaving the Saint‑Rémy hospital, featuring his interactions with Dr. Gachet’s family?
narrative: The user seeks a film or video segment that depicts Vincent van Gogh’s period in Auvers‑sur‑Oise, including his relationships with Dr. Gachet, Marguerite, and his artistic activities. Relevant documents should contain contextual details, dates, biographical info and must be focused on that specific time frame; unrelated works, general art overviews or other biographies are not relevant.

title: Kid-friendly Oil-Blue Lamps
description: Which oil‑blue lamps are safe, stylish, and affordable for a children’s bedroom?
narrative: The user wants to buy an oil‑blue lamp to use in a child’s bedroom. They need a lamp that is aesthetically pleasing in the blue hue, made of safe materials (metal or brass) suitable for children, provides a subtle or dim light appropriate for bedtime, and is affordable with good online availability, free or fast shipping, and possibly promotional pricing. Relevant results should list product details such as lamp type (lay lamp, table lamp, or round suspension), color (oil‑blue, petroleum blue), material, dimensions, and price, along with user reviews or safety certifications. Non‑relevant items include lamps that are not oil‑blue, adult furniture, or lighting products unrelated to a child’s bedroom.

title: Fabric & Shipping Requirements
description: How many meters of Zen Cotton Velvet are required, including hems, to cover a 180 cm window, and is express shipping available for orders above 150 €?
narrative: The user intends to design curtains for a specific window size and needs an exact fabric quantity that accounts for upper (10 cm) and lower (20 cm) hems, while also verifying if express delivery is offered for orders exceeding the free‑shipping threshold. Relevant information includes the fabric width (139 cm), the meter calculation guidelines, and the express shipping policy tied to a 150 € order.

title: Lunar Potato Timing
description: When is the optimal period for planting and harvesting potatoes in temperate zones using lunar phases?
narrative: The user is a hobbyist gardener seeking detailed guidance on aligning potato cultivation with moon cycles in temperate climates, taking into account frost risk, variety suitability, and harvest windows. Relevant content should explain how lunar phases influence planting and harvesting, provide climate‑specific timing, and offer practical tips for maximizing yield and quality.

title: Back‑to‑Work Bonus
description: Is a new employee in France entitled to the back‑to‑work bonus after completing only one month of employment and what conditions apply?
narrative:
The user seeks detailed, up‑to‑date guidance on the French "prime d'engagement" (back‑to‑work bonus), specifically whether it can be claimed after the first month of a CDI or other contract, and what eligibility criteria still apply following the 2009 transition from RMI to RSA.  Key points to address include: 
1.  The statutory definition of the bonus (originally €1,000) and the change to the “prime d’engagement” under the 2009 RSA reform. 2.  The eligibility window: normally the bonus is payable after the fourth month of a new contract for persons who have been unemployed or receiving RSA/AMO prior to employment; however, some practitioners note that if the employer(s) *themselves* champion the bonus, it may be awarded after one month. 3.  The legal basis for claiming the bonus and the difference between primary eligiblity (having been on unemployment or RSA/AMO) versus secondary eligibility (those who left RMI before 2010 or have a valid residence permit). 4.  The application process: who administers the bonus (CAF, Pôle Emploi, regional council), required documentation (employment contract, dismissal notice, proof of RSA receipt or unemployment record), and deadlines. 5.  Potential exclusions: employees who find a job after May 31 2009 under RSA are generally considered ineligible, and the bonus has been officially deprecated for RMI/AMO beneficiaries in the 2010 literature, yet anecdotal evidence suggests it can still be obtained for certain categories. 6.  Practical considerations for part‑time work, temporary agencies, or “social company” contracts, as these can affect the calculation of the bonus. 7.  Current policy updates or legislative amendments that might have changed the timeframe or amount since the documents were published.  By synthesizing these criteria and offering a structured pathway for the user (who may still be a permanent resident or a citizen with valid residency documentation), the answer should clarify under what exact circumstances a one‑month‑old CDI can trigger the bonus and how to proceed with the claim, while acknowledging the ambiguities and historic changes that may impact relevance.
